title: Rails ActiveRecord
description: A single SQL query executed via Rails' ActiveRecord, emitted by the Honeybadger Insights instrumentation. One event per query — there is no aggregated per-request rollup at this level; join with the matching process_action.action_controller event via request_id::str for request-scoped totals.

query.description: The SQL text with bind parameters substituted with ?. Group by query::str to bucket repeats; the same query text recurs across requests.

duration.description: Wall-clock time the query took, in milliseconds. Type-hint as ::float (or ::int if you only need integer ms).

cached.description: Whether the query result was served from the ActiveRecord query cache.

async.description: Whether the query was executed asynchronously.

request_id.description: Rails request UUID, merged globally by the agent for all events fired during a request. Ties this query to the parent process_action.action_controller and sibling render_*.action_view events from the same request.

instrumenter_id.description: ActiveSupport::Notifications instrumenter UUID, added by the Honeybadger notification subscriber.
